title: Build an HTML Audio and Video Player
description: A combined media page that embeds both a video and an audio player using native HTML elements. The page uses a main element with two sections — one for a video with a source element specifying the file type, and one for a looping audio track — demonstrating how to handle different media types within a single structured page.
objectives: Use main and section elements for semantic page structure
Embed a video with the video element and a nested source element
Embed audio using the audio element with src, controls, and loop
Set appropriate width and controls attributes on media elements
Match the type attribute to the correct MIME type of each media file
